Name: Idle
Outputs: All outputs off except optional HMI heartbeat
Exit Conditions: Start command and DUT_PRESENT and CLAMP_CLOSED and DOOR_CLOSED
Fault Checks: Any safety input loss holds idle

Name: Precheck
Entry Conditions: DUT present clamp closed door closed logger ready

Name: Thermal Exposure
Outputs: LAMP_ENABLE on DUT_POWER on LOGGER_TRIGGER pulse

Name: Fault
Outputs: FAIL_LIGHT on BUZZER pulse all hazardous outputs off
Exit Conditions: Fault reset and safe inputs restored
